title: lygodium kerstenii
intro: Lygodium kerstenii, also known as the fern fern, is a type of climbing fern native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, particularly in Fiji, Samoa, and Tonga. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lygodium kerstenii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
